lines.text: I just lost my girlfriend because she thinks I'm not manly enough. From a toy's perspective, that means I’m not metal, not sturdy, not active enough. I know that sounds silly, but it still hurts.

choices.choiceText: Sit with him and say everything will be okay.
List all the parts he should change to seem better.

lines.text: ...Thanks. I needed someone to stay beside me more than I needed advice. That means a lot.
Oh. I asked for comfort, not a repair list. I guess that answers whether I was right to trust you.
